jd_summary: "Fullstack Software Engineer at The Economist Group \u2014 build and maintain web applications across frontend (React) and backend (Node.js), deploy on AWS, and deliver features for 1.2M+ subscribers at economist.com."
jd_responsibilities: ["Build and maintain web applications across frontend and backend", "Develop responsive and accessible UIs with React", "Implement backend services and APIs", "Contribute to system design discussions", "Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code", "Monitor and improve application performance and reliability", "Work with cloud services (AWS) to deploy and operate applications", "Participate in code reviews, testing, and CI/CD", "Collaborate with Product and Design"]
jd_requirements: ["5+ years web development (frontend + backend)", "JavaScript or TypeScript", "Modern frontend frameworks (React)", "Building APIs and backend technologies (Node.js)", "Web fundamentals: performance and accessibility", "Cloud platforms (AWS) and modern dev practices", "Version control, testing, CI/CD", "Problem-solving and learning mindset", "Communication and collaboration"]
tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Srabutan.com fullstack marketplace", "CITT Services multi-client web platforms", "Wirecard high-traffic payment gateway"]
tailoring_custom_summary: Fullstack web engineer with 10+ years of experience building high-performance, user-facing web applications across media, fintech, and e-commerce domains. Strong command of React, TypeScript, and Node.js — from crafting responsive, accessible interfaces to designing the backend APIs and services that power them. Shipped production systems serving real users at scale, including payment platforms processing transactions across 69 countries and multi-tenant SaaS dashboards for financial services clients. Experienced with AWS cloud infrastructure, automated CI/CD pipelines, and modern testing practices. Comfortable working autonomously in remote-first teams, contributing to system design discussions, and delivering clean, well-tested code that balances speed with maintainability.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Built and maintained multi-tenant web applications serving 6 fintech clients (Pepperstone, TitanFX, BaxiaMarkets) using React, Vue, and Node.js \u2014 delivering responsive, accessible dashboards for real-time financial data", "Architected and implemented full-stack freelance marketplace (Srabutan.com) from scratch \u2014 React frontend, Python/FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL, with automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions and Docker", "Developed automated data synchronization pipelines using Node.js, Python, and n8n that reduced manual processing by 80% for real-time forex trading systems", "Engineered PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway integrations at Wirecard handling transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients \u2014 Java/Spring backend with rigorous testing and code review practices", "Deployed and operated web applications on AWS and DigitalOcean, implementing CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker for zero-downtime deployments", "Contributed to system design and architecture decisions across 20+ projects \u2014 from database schema design to API contract definition to frontend component architecture"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook: The Economist has been a constant in my reading life for over a decade — its blend of analytical rigour and global perspective shaped how I think about technology's role in society. When I saw the Software Engineer role, I immediately recognized the opportunity to bring my fullstack expertise to a product that genuinely matters: delivering insight and analysis to 1.2 million subscribers who depend on it to navigate the world's most complex challenges.

jd_summary: "Solution Architect at Xtremax Pte Ltd \u2014 design cloud-native architectures for enterprise clients, lead MVP/POC delivery, drive IaC and automation, and ensure security compliance across AWS/Azure environments."
jd_responsibilities: ["Client collaboration and requirements translation", "Cloud-native solution development for scalability and cost-effectiveness", "Business and technical problem analysis", "Precise specification and delivery of cloud solutions with IaC", "MVP and POC leadership", "Complex technical troubleshooting in cloud environments", "Automation initiatives with Python, PowerShell, Bash", "Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, CloudFormation, Azure RM", "Security best practices and compliance", "Continuous learning of emerging cloud technologies"]
jd_requirements: ["5 years IT experience", "Complex solutions on AWS or Azure", "Bachelor degree in CS/CE/IT preferred", "Containers and serverless architecture", "Relational/non-relational database design", "Agile, DevOps, DevSecOps experience", "Infrastructure automation with Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible", "Strong communication and presentation skills"]
tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Srabutan.com AI marketplace architecture", "Wirecard payment gateway cloud infrastructure", "CITT Services fintech platform consulting"]
tailoring_custom_summary: Solution Architect with 10+ years of experience designing and delivering cloud-native systems across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS domains. Proven ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable, secure architectures on AWS and Azure — from PCI-DSS compliant payment gateways serving 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries to containerized microservice platforms with automated CI/CD pipelines. Deep expertise in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and CloudFormation, combined with hands-on proficiency in Python and Bash for automation workflows. Experienced in leading MVP and POC delivery for enterprise clients, with a track record of presenting technical solutions to C-level stakeholders while maintaining strict security and compliance standards.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Architected end-to-end payment gateway integration at Wirecard, connecting Prisma Gateway with banking systems for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries with full PCI-DSS compliance", "Designed and deployed containerized microservices architecture for Srabutan.com freelance marketplace, implementing automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker on Railway cloud", "Delivered consulting solutions for 6 fintech clients including Pepperstone, TitanFX, and BaxiaMarkets \u2014 building web applications and backend systems deployed on DigitalOcean and Google Cloud", "Built automated data synchronization pipelines using Python, Flask, and n8n for real-time forex trade systems, reducing manual data processing by 80%", "Led infrastructure automation initiatives using Bash scripting and Docker, standardizing deployment workflows across multiple client environments", "Designed relational database schemas (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and non-relational stores (MongoDB) for high-throughput transaction processing systems"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook: When I read that Xtremax is looking for a Solution Architect who can bridge the gap between client vision and technical delivery, I recognized the exact role I have been building toward. My career has been defined by sitting across the table from stakeholders — from CITT's fintech clients like Pepperstone and TitanFX to Wirecard's enterprise banking partners — and translating their business challenges into cloud-native architectures that actually ship.

tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["Solution Architecture & Presales", "AI Agents & LLM Workflows", "n8n Automation", "API Integration Design", "CRM & Marketing Automation", "Scope Management & Documentation", "Python & FastAPI", "Cloud Architecture (AWS, GCP)", "Stakeholder Communication", "System Design"]

tailoring_custom_summary: Solutions architect with 10 years across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS. Hands-on with automation (n8n, Python), LLMs (Hermes agent framework, OpenClaw, Groq), and cloud architecture (AWS SAA, GCP PCA). At CITT Services, partnered directly with enterprise sales teams at Pepperstone and TitanFX to scope technical solutions and prevent scope creep. Now building Srabutan.com with AI matching, real-time collaboration, and payment systems end-to-end.

tailoring_cover_letter_hook: I build AI systems that close deals - not just demos. With 10 years spanning payment infrastructure across 69 countries and modern AI agent platforms, I bring the rare combination of presales-ready communication and deep technical execution that Cekat.AI needs as Indonesia's leading AI agent platform scales.

jd_summary: The company was founded by Cornell computer scientists, who partnered with Wall Street veterans and early Web3 leaders to execute a promising vision for redefining the way people build permissionless networks.
jd_responsibilities: ["Design, develop, and maintain crypto wallet systems using TypeScript, Node, & REST API, & Go. Pushing to advance the client application experience", "Architect modular, scalable backend systems with an unwavering commitment to security and performance", "Work closely with Partners to optimize configurations and setups for Ava Labs products", "Provide technical guidance across Business Development, Product, Security, Finance, and Engineering teams", "Assess opportunities and recommend solutions tailored to client needs", "Establish architectures and systems that ensure mass adoption of Ava Labs products while maintaining top-tier security", "Demonstrate an independent, driven mindset that thrives on taking initiative without being micromanaged", "Take full responsibility for delivering high-quality, secure backend solutions while continuously embracing challenges, learning, and pushing boundaries to drive product excellence", "A self-driven, independent mindset with extreme ownership over your work and outcomes", "Thrive in an environment where you are empowered to take initiative and work autonomously without being micromanaged", "Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to overcoming technical challenges", "A user-centric approach to designing and launching high-quality products that fuel the growth of the crypto economy"]
jd_requirements: ["API & data ownership: designed/operated REST APIs, modeled data (Postgres/SQLite), and built real-time features (WebSockets/webhooks) with strong DX and documentation.", "Infrastructure Exposure (Basic Kubernetes (K8), Docker, CI/CD, Cloudflare)", "Experience with Github Actions, as well as developing microservices architecture", "Security-first mindset: collaborate effectively with Security/Compliance; manage secrets; build auditability and observability into the product.", "Prior senior-level engineering experience in a blockchain, DeFi, or crypto organization", "Deep understanding of both UTXO and account models, state management, consensus mechanisms", "5+ years of hands-on engineering experience delivering features across Backend and Fullstack (TypeScript/Node)", "Proven ability to empathize with customer challenges and translate those insights into actionable development priorities"]

jd_summary: Job Description Summary Responsible for multiple projects as a project leader or internal consultant.

Are you a talented Senior Developer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.

 

What we offer:

app_notes: Strong fit — 10+ years fintech, payment gateway experience at Pepperstone/TitanFX, PCI-DSS compliance, React/Next.js/Node.js stack aligns perfectly.
jd_summary: NexPay Financial is building the next-generation cross-border payment infrastructure for Southeast Asia. We need a Senior Fullstack Engineer who can own the platform team frontend and backend architecture.
jd_responsibilities: ["Design and implement scalable payment processing pipelines handling 10K+ TPS","Build and maintain merchant-facing dashboards with React/Next.js","Architect RESTful and WebSocket APIs with Node.js/NestJS","Optimize PostgreSQL queries for financial reporting and reconciliation","Ensure PCI-DSS compliance across all payment flows","Mentor 3–5 mid-level engineers through code reviews and architecture discussions"]

tailoring_custom_summary: Senior fullstack architect with 10+ years building high-performance fintech platforms across Southeast Asia. Deep expertise in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL powering payment gateways that process transactions across 69 countries. Proven track record architecting PCI-DSS compliant systems at Wirecard, Pepperstone, and TitanFX.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Architected payment gateway integrations for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries at Wirecard","Built CrosSyncOrder — forex trade synchronization platform handling real-time WebSocket streams at scale","Reduced Docker images by 81% using multi-stage builds for fintech microservices","Drove PCI-DSS compliance across all payment implementations from Wirecard through current projects"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook: I have spent the last decade building exactly the kind of payment infrastructure NexPay is scaling — from integrating Wirecard Prisma Gateway for 14K+ corporate clients across 69 countries, to architecting real-time trade synchronization systems at CrosSyncOrder.
